environment_prompt: A cozy cafe interior in flat illustration style with warm muted tones and minimal shading. A simple wooden table in the foreground with two steaming mugs and a croissant on a plate, next to a window with soft curtains filtering afternoon light. A potted plant on a shelf in the background, a barista preparing drinks behind an open kitchen counter. Relaxing and inviting atmosphere. Below the table, a leather bag rests on the tiled floor beside the chair leg. Beyond the window, a quiet cobblestone street with a parked bicycle and a small bookshop across the road are faintly visible through the curtains.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view seated at the wooden table, looking across the cafe interior toward the kitchen counter and window. No visible character body.
